name: Troll Stealer
description: [Troll Stealer](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1196) is an information stealer written in Go associated with [Kimsuky](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0094) operations. [Troll Stealer](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1196) has typically been delivered through a dropper disguised as a legitimate security program installation file.
